title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with New India Assurance! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!
